function.name: get_preferences
function.description: Fetch a registered payer's profile and preferences (autopay, paperless, channels, payment_day). Backed by GET /payers/{id}?biller_id=. Only for payers with an account in session; guest payers have none.

biller_id.description: The biller tenant for the current portal session (partition key).

function.name: create_payer_account
function.description: Register a payer account for this biller. Backed by POST /payers. Call ONLY after explicit payer opt-in — registration is offered, never imposed, and guest pay must remain available.

biller_id.description: The biller tenant for the current portal session (partition key).

account_numbers.description: External biller account numbers to link to this payer.

payment_day.description: Preferred day of month for scheduled payments.
